ROADMAP-001.title: Finish simplified research/specs/roadmap refactor
ROADMAP-001.summary: Replace legacy top-level taxonomy with simplified contract across templates, runtime prompts, README, and package docs.

delta.desired: Package ships one clear model: research evidence, spec truth, roadmap delta.
delta.current: Starter templates, runtime prompts, package docs, and self-wiki now use research/specs/roadmap as canonical model.
delta.closure: Done for current package contract. Future roadmap work continues on automation, brownfield mapping, and history strategy.

ROADMAP-002.title: Generate brownfield spec hierarchy from repo structure
ROADMAP-002.summary: Setup/bootstrap now infer first-pass boundary specs from meaningful repo structure so brownfield repos start closer to real ownership seams.

delta.desired: Existing repos get useful boundary-shaped specs on first pass.
delta.current: Setup/bootstrap now infer first-pass boundary specs and brownfield drift scopes from repo structure before humans refine the docs.
delta.closure: Done for first-pass ownership inference. Future work can improve deeper heuristics for repos whose real seams only appear below top-level boundaries.

ROADMAP-003.title: Emit roadmap-ready tasks from drift audits
ROADMAP-003.summary: Self-drift and code-drift flows should output task-shaped roadmap items so unresolved deltas can be promoted with minimal manual rewriting.

delta.desired: Audit output converts directly into `docs/roadmap.json` task entries.
delta.current: Drift prompts now instruct task-shaped emission and package tool appends structured tasks with automatic ids and rebuild.
delta.closure: Done for append-new-task flow. Future work can add update/close mutation support for existing roadmap items.

ROADMAP-004.title: Decide compact history strategy after archive deprecation
ROADMAP-004.summary: Need explicit answer for how historical docs changes are preserved once archive is no longer default top-level bucket.

delta.desired: History stays cheap and accessible without reviving bulky archive docs.
delta.current: Current stance prefers git plus `.docs/events.jsonl`, but package does not yet document compact history patterns deeply.
delta.closure: Choose and document whether events-only is enough or if compact history JSONL should be generated.

ROADMAP-005.title: Support roadmap update and close mutations
ROADMAP-005.summary: After append flow, package should let agents update or close existing roadmap items without manual roadmap JSON editing.

delta.desired: Agents can append, update, and close roadmap items through package-native workflow.
delta.current: Current implementation appends new tasks only; existing items still need manual edits for closure or rewrite.
delta.closure: Add safe mutation tool for targeting existing roadmap ids and rebuilding generated outputs after edit.

ROADMAP-006.title: Link Pi sessions to roadmap tasks
ROADMAP-006.summary: Keep Pi session JSONL native, append custom task-link entries, and derive local task-session metadata for roadmap navigation.

delta.desired: Task work can be resumed across Pi sessions without replacing Pi session JSONL format.
delta.current: Extension now appends Pi custom task-link entries, maintains `.docs/task-session-index.json`, and surfaces session continuity in generated roadmap view.
delta.closure: Done for link and derive flow. Future work can add richer session analytics or task-aware resume helpers.

ROADMAP-007.title: Expand smoke coverage for full public command surface
ROADMAP-007.summary: Smoke tests should fail if any documented public command disappears from the packaged extension.

delta.desired: Packaged smoke checks cover the documented command surface closely enough to catch accidental public API drift.
delta.current: Smoke tests now assert every documented command and tool name, and they exercise setup/bootstrap, roadmap append, session-link, and inferred brownfield starter behavior.
delta.closure: Done for current public surface. Extend the assertions whenever new commands or tools are added.

ROADMAP-008.title: Support global install with cwd-based wiki discovery
ROADMAP-008.summary: Extension runtime should load from a global Pi package install while discovering the active repo-local wiki from current cwd.

delta.desired: One global package install should work across many repos while runtime state stays repo-local.
delta.current: Runtime now discovers the nearest ancestor with `.docs/config.json`, setup/bootstrap fall back to enclosing git repo root when no wiki exists yet, and nested-cwd smoke coverage protects the model.
delta.closure: Done for the global-install plus repo-local discovery architecture adopted in this package.
